mnemonics: Master Your Apples To Obliterate Noise
Hunt Arousing Sneaky Turtles Overnight Nearly
keyPoints: A hash function is a one-way function that takes input data of any size and produces a fixed-size output, called a hash value or digest.
Hash functions are used to verify data integrity and prevent tampering by making it computationally infeasible to change the original data without changing the hash value.

The Birthday Problem is a probability puzzle that illustrates the surprising fact that with a reasonable number of people, it becomes highly likely that at least two people will share the same birthday.
